acceptance.proof: One nonempty <=127-byte UTF-8 String preserves exact bytes and timestamp through the observed initialization and length form in finite loopback directions.
Capability, bounds, UTF-8, initialization, length, truncation, marker, cancellation, deadline, I/O, handshake, and cleanup failures are typed and atomic.
Runtime, tests, fixture, provenance, routes, and limitations remain exactly bound to LSLC-003Q and require LSLC-003S StringSample.
Policy, public boundary, instruction synchronization, and workflow contracts pass without activation or authority drift.

commit_policy: Commit proposal/lifecycle separately; implement only exact paths; publish no private driver/raw/endpoint data; preserve failed attempts and LSLC-003R blocker.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Bound the exact capability-gated String runtime and exclusions.
Route selected run-disabled bounded String runtime.
Describe closed runtime composition and authority boundary.
Separate implemented bounded behavior from observation and excluded breadth.
Bind independent implementation to sanitized observation without source copying.
Route focused runtime through sole policy.
Existing LSL ownership and activation routing applies.
Existing closed activation, evidence, and authority guidance applies.

non_scope: Empty or >127-byte Strings, multiple channels or caller records, arbitrary length forms, chunks, int64, numeric changes, non-loopback networking, discovery changes, queueing, recovery, clock algorithms, or broad compatibility.

Activation changes, new runtime authority, devices, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, official or rLSL source, copied/translated source, private raw publication, commands derived from samples, or Manifold authority.
objective: Implement one independently authored finite IPv4-loopback String runtime for exactly one channel and one caller record, a nonempty payload of at most 127 UTF-8 bytes, the two LSLC-003Q-observed initialization records, and observed one-byte length form, requiring the distinct LSLC-003S StringSample capability.
outputs: A closed public String record, limits, capability composition, and finite inlet/outlet functions for exactly one channel and one caller record.
Typed bounds, UTF-8, initialization, length, marker, truncation, cancellation, deadline, I/O, handshake, capability, and cleanup evidence.
A sanitized implementation fixture and policy-owned focused validator bound to LSLC-003Q and LSLC-003S.
